PRODUCT: SdiA is a cell division regulator that is also a positive regulator of AcrAB only when it's expressed from a plasmid. When the sdiA gene is on the chromosome it has no effect on expression of acrAB.
AAC(6')-Iaa is a chromosomal-encoded aminoglycoside acetyltransferase in S. typhimurium.
A multidrug and toxic compound extrusions (MATE) transporter conferring resistance to norfloxacin doxorubicin and acriflavine.
